metaTitle: Image to Text Converter — Free Online OCR for Photos & Screenshots
metaDescription: Extract text from images online free. AI OCR converts photos, screenshots, and scanned documents to editable text. Supports PNG, JPG, BMP, WebP. No sign-up needed.
keywords: image to text, extract text from image, photo to text, ocr image, image to text converter, screenshot to text, picture to text, free ocr online, image ocr, convert image to text
heroText: AI-powered OCR extracts text from any image — photos, screenshots, or scanned documents. Support for PNG, JPG, BMP, WebP. Export to Word, TXT, or Markdown.
geoDescription: Free online image to text converter. Extract editable text from photos and screenshots with AI-powered OCR. Works in your browser — no installation required.
howStep1Desc: Drop an image file or click to browse. Supports PNG, JPG, JPEG, BMP, WebP — up to 50MB per file.
howStep2Desc: Structured OCR recognizes text from photos and screenshots with layout awareness. Works with handwritten notes, printed text, and mixed content.
howStep3Desc: Refine extracted text in the workbench editor, translate if needed, then export to Word, TXT, HTML, or Markdown.

seoFaq.q1: How do I extract text from an image online for free?
seoFaq.a1: Upload your image (PNG, JPG, BMP, or WebP) to our free online image to text converter. The AI OCR automatically recognizes and extracts all text content. You can then edit, translate, and export the text to multiple formats.
seoFaq.q2: Can I extract text from a screenshot?
seoFaq.a2: Yes. Simply upload your screenshot and the AI OCR will recognize and extract all visible text. This works for UI screenshots, social media posts, error messages, and any other screen captures.
seoFaq.q3: What image formats are supported for OCR?
seoFaq.a3: We support PNG, JPG/JPEG, BMP, and WebP image formats. The maximum file size is 50MB per image. For best results, use clear, well-lit images with readable text.
seoFaq.q4: Is the image to text converter free to use?
seoFaq.a4: New users receive free credits to try the image to text OCR converter. Premium features include higher resolution processing, batch image upload, and priority processing speed.
seoFaq.q5: Can I translate the extracted text to another language?
seoFaq.a5: Yes. After the OCR extracts text from your image, you can use the built-in translation feature to translate the extracted text to any of our 10+ supported languages right in the workbench editor.
